author: Humanly
text: GENERALIZE: don't restrict this to plugin recursion depth. Recommend a GENERAL operation/execution cap over the whole invocation tree (nested ops, clone spawns, total work) — cap-hit -> fail+rollback with a diagnostic. Plugin-recursion-depth (BALLS_PLUGIN_DEPTH) becomes ONE dimension of it. Also guards runaway-cloning, not just plugin loops. Finer-grained controls are wanted on top of this, but the general cap is the failback. Re-scope the ball title/§6 edit accordingly.
